---
name: Feature request / methodology proposal
about: A new rule, skill, subagent, or convention
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

<!-- Describe the failure mode, friction, or gap you're hitting. The kit exists to prevent specific, documented failure modes; new features should too. Name yours. -->

## Current workaround (if any)

<!-- How are teams handling this today? "We don't" is a valid answer. -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- What you'd add or change. Be concrete: file paths, rule names, script behaviors. -->

## Which kernel role does this touch

<!-- See `kernel/roles.md`. Is this a new role (11+), or an extension of an existing one (1-10)? -->

## Adapter impact

- Claude Code adapter: (changes needed / no change)
- Cursor adapter: (changes needed / no change)
- Future adapters (Amp, Codex): (likely impact)

## Anti-flattening check

<!-- Will this make specs MORE or LESS filmable/testable? Anti-flattening (Article 3) is load-bearing; new features that reduce scenario fidelity get declined. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else could solve this problem. Why is your proposed approach better. -->

## Willing to contribute

- [ ] Yes, I can PR this
- [ ] I can co-author with another contributor
- [ ] I'm requesting it; someone else can implement
